glosses.en: to rush over; to come running
glosses.ro: a veni în fugă; a se repezi
glosses.ja: 駆けつける; 走って来る

translations.en: I rush over at your call.
translations.es: Voy corriendo en cuanto me llamas.
translations.de: Ich komme angerannt, sobald du anrufst.
translations.it: Vengo di corsa appena mi chiami.
translations.zh-Hans: 你一打电话我就赶过去。
translations.yue: 你一打嚟我就即刻趕過去。
translations.ru: Я примчусь, как только ты позвонишь.
translations.pt: Vou correndo assim que você ligar.
translations.he: אני מגיע בריצה מיד כשאתה מתקשר.
translations.vi: Tôi chạy đến ngay khi bạn gọi.
translations.nl: Ik kom aanrennen zodra je belt.
translations.hi: तुम जैसे ही कॉल करते हो, मैं तुरंत पहुँच जाता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg kommer løpende så snart du ringer.
translations.id: Aku datang berlari begitu kamu menelepon.
translations.sv: Jag kommer springande så fort du ringer.
translations.ro: Vin în fugă de îndată ce mă suni.
translations.da: Jeg kommer løbende, så snart du ringer.
translations.ja: 君が電話したらすぐに駆けつける。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular present indicative of 'accourir' with elided subject clitic 'je' before a vowel-initial verb; finite verb functioning as the clause predicate.
Preposition meaning 'from'/'as soon as', introducing a temporal noun phrase.
Second-person singular possessive determiner, masculine singular, agreeing with the following noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the prepositional complement introduced by 'dès'.

sentences.target: Les voisins accourent au moindre cri.

translations.fr: Les voisins accourent au moindre cri.
translations.en: The neighbors come running at the slightest shout.
translations.es: Los vecinos acuden corriendo al menor grito.
translations.de: Die Nachbarn kommen beim kleinsten Schrei angerannt.
translations.it: I vicini accorrono al minimo grido.
translations.zh-Hans: 邻居们听到一点喊声就跑出来。
translations.yue: 鄰居哋聽到少少喊聲就即刻跑出嚟。
translations.pt: Os vizinhos vêm correndo ao menor grito.
translations.he: השכנים רצים החוצה מכל צעקה קטנה.
translations.tr: Komşular en küçük çığlıkta koşup geliyor.
translations.vi: Hàng xóm chạy đến ngay khi có tiếng la nhỏ nhất.
translations.nl: De buren komen aanrennen bij de kleinste kreet.
translations.hu: A szomszédok a legkisebb kiáltásra is odarohannak.
translations.hi: पड़ोसी ज़रा सी चीख पर दौड़कर आ जाते हैं.
translations.el: Οι γείτονες έρχονται τρέχοντας με την παραμικρή κραυγή.
translations.nb: Naboene kommer løpende ved det minste rop.
translations.id: Para tetangga berlari datang saat ada teriakan sekecil apa pun.
translations.sv: Grannarna kommer springande vid minsta rop.
translations.ro: Vecinii vin în fugă la cel mai mic strigăt.
translations.da: Naboerne kommer løbende ved det mindste råb.
translations.ja: 近所の人はちょっとした叫び声でも駆けつけてくる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, plural, marking the noun phrase 'les voisins' as definite.
Common noun, masculine plural; subject of the verb.
3rd person plural present indicative of 'accourir'; main predicate of the clause.
Contraction of preposition 'à' and definite article 'le'; introduces and determines the following noun phrase.
Attributive adjective meaning 'slightest/least', pre-nominal, agreeing in gender and number with 'cri' (masculine singular here).
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'à' within the prepositional phrase.

translations.en: Thanks for rushing over so quickly.
translations.de: Danke, dass du so schnell hergeeilt bist.
translations.it: Grazie per essere arrivato così in fretta.
translations.zh-Hans: 谢谢你这么快就赶来了。
translations.pt: Obrigado por ter vindo tão rápido.
translations.tr: Bu kadar hızlı geldiğin için teşekkürler.
translations.vi: Cảm ơn bạn đã đến nhanh như vậy.
translations.nl: Bedankt dat je zo snel bent gekomen.
translations.hi: इतनी जल्दी पहुँचने के लिए धन्यवाद.
translations.nb: Takk for at du kom så raskt.
translations.id: Terima kasih sudah datang begitu cepat.
translations.sv: Tack för att du kom så snabbt.
translations.ro: Mulțumesc că ai venit atât de repede.
translations.cs: Díky, že jsi přišel tak rychle.
translations.da: Tak fordi du kom så hurtigt.
translations.ja: こんなに早く来てくれてありがとう。

tokens.explanation: Common noun used in a formulaic expression 'merci de + infinitif' meaning 'thanks for ...'; head that selects a 'de' + infinitive complement.
Infinitive of 'accourir' introduced by elided preposition 'de'; complements 'merci' ('merci de + infinitif').
Degree adverb modifying 'vite'.
Adverb of manner; head of the adverbial phrase 'si vite' modifying the infinitive 'accourir'.

translations.en: You come running at the bell.
translations.es: Ustedes vienen corriendo cuando suena el timbre.
translations.yue: 門鈴一響你哋就即刻跑出嚟。
translations.pt: Vocês vêm correndo ao toque da campainha.
translations.he: ברגע שהפעמון מצלצל אתם רצים החוצה.
translations.vi: Chuông vừa reo là các bạn chạy ra ngay.
translations.ar: ما إن يرن الجرس حتى تندفعون راكضين.
translations.nl: Als de bel gaat komen jullie aangerend.
translations.hi: घंटी बजते ही तुम लोग दौड़ते हुए आ जाते हो.
translations.nb: Når det ringer på, kommer dere løpende.
translations.id: Begitu bel berbunyi, kalian berlari keluar.
translations.sv: Så fort det ringer i dörrklockan, kommer ni springande.
translations.ro: Cum sună soneria, veniți în fugă.
translations.da: Så snart dørklokken ringer, kommer I løbende.
translations.fi: Heti kun ovikello soi, tulette juosten.
translations.ja: ベルが鳴ると、あなたたちは走って出てくる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person plural (or formal singular), subject of the verb.
2nd person plural present indicative of 'accourir'; main predicate.
Preposition introducing the noun phrase 'la sonnette'.
Definite article, feminine singular, determining 'sonnette'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'à'.
